<?php /** * This file is part of the ramsey/uuid library * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @copyright Copyright (c) Ben Ramsey <ben@benramsey.com> * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT MIT */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Ramsey\Uuid\Provider; use Ramsey\Uuid\Type\Hexadecimal; /** * A node provider retrieves or generates a node ID */ interface NodeProviderInterface { /** * Returns a node ID * * @return Hexadecimal The node ID as a hexadecimal string */ public function getNode(): Hexadecimal; }
